Hero.description: Transforming business visions into interactive experiences through strategic design and high-end technology.

Methodology.subtitle: My work philosophy is based on friction reduction. Less visual noise, more execution speed.
Methodology.step1_desc: Not just code, but optimized systems. Total focus on Core Web Vitals and efficient rendering with Next.js.
Methodology.step2_desc: Interfaces that breathe. I use Figma and Tailwind to create consistent and visually impactful design systems.
Methodology.step3_desc: Clean and typed code with TypeScript. Prepared to grow without generating accumulated technical debt.
Methodology.footer_text: // Focused on delivering results, not just files.

Workflow.step1_desc: Deep analysis of the problem, definition of objectives and mapping of technical requirements.
Workflow.step2_desc: Creation of intuitive interfaces and high-fidelity prototyping focused on conversion.
Workflow.step3_desc: Transformation of the design into clean, performant and scalable code using React/Next.js.
Workflow.step4_desc: Final optimization, rigorous testing and launch on Edge infrastructure.

Services.main_card_desc: Creation of complete web applications, from design to API. I use the React ecosystem to deliver fast, secure and scale-ready interfaces.
Services.step1_desc: Code refactoring and caching strategies for applications that load instantly.
Services.step2_desc: Robust architectures using Node.js and integration with relational databases.
Services.step3_desc: Prototypaging and implementation of modern designs focused on usability and aesthetics.
Services.step4_desc: Best security practices and search engine optimization from day one.
Services.step5_desc: Creating responsive, accessible, and user-centric interfaces using the most modern technologies in the market.

TechStack.subtitle: Building resilient applications with the most advanced technologies in the JavaScript ecosystem and interface design.

Contact.description: I'm always open to new opportunities and strategic partnerships. Initiate the protocol to build something memorable.
Contact.referral_text: You received a 10% discount via {name}'s referral
Contact.success_message: Protocol established. I will review your requirements and respond within 24 hours.
Contact.placeholder_briefing: Describe your challenge, goals, and references...

power-fit.title: POWER.FIT
power-fit.description: The next generation of fitness management: Generative AI, gamification and high-performance architecture.
power-fit.challenge: POWER.FIT was developed to solve the fragmentation between workout logging, nutritional tracking and social motivation, using the state of the art of the TypeScript ecosystem.
power-fit.solution: We architected an SPA with SSR performance, integrated native AI via Vercel AI SDK for workout generation and a contract-driven architecture for zero integration errors.
results: Automatic workout generation via natural language
100% Type-Safe architecture with Swagger/Orval sync
Consistency visualization inspired by GitHub's grid
Asynchronous achievement and XP pipeline for retention

powervet.title: PowerVet
powervet.description: Expert veterinary care for cats, combining advanced medical treatment with personalized attention for feline wellbeing.
powervet.challenge: Creating a digital presence that reflects technical specialization and trust in the feline health niche, focusing on long-term wellness.
powervet.solution: A high-conversion landing page focused on accessibility and modern React patterns for a seamless user experience.
results: Premium brand positioning in the veterinary sector
Responsive interface optimized for quick bookings
Integrated educational modules on preventive care
Exceptional technical performance for organic SEO

horizon-travels.title: Horizon Travels
horizon-travels.description: Immersive journeys connecting travelers with authentic experiences and seamless global planning.
horizon-travels.challenge: The travel industry requires high-impact visual storytelling to convert interest into bookings in a highly competitive environment.
horizon-travels.solution: A media-rich platform with immersive scroll animations and a curated UX that guides the user through global destinations.
results: 120% increase in engagement through immersive storytelling
Simplified planning flow with interactive cards
Image loading strategy optimized for high resolution
Mobile-first design for travelers on the go

voltage-festival.title: Voltage Festival
voltage-festival.description: An immersive indoor electronic music experience featuring world-class DJs and nonstop energy.
voltage-festival.challenge: Capturing the vibrant energy and pulse of a techno rave in a static web environment while maintaining performance.
voltage-festival.solution: A high-intensity dark UI with neon accents and dynamic visual elements that react to the rhythm of electronic music.
results: Interactive lineup exploration with real-time DJ status
Neon design system with OKLCH color optimization
High-performance ticket integration flow
Viral landing page with social sharing features

haven-barbershop.title: Haven Barbershop
haven-barbershop.description: Premium barbershop experience with precision cuts, classic techniques, and modern ritual-focused style.
haven-barbershop.challenge: Transforming a standard service into a luxury ritual through a digital experience that exudes craftsmanship.
haven-barbershop.solution: Zinc-based color palette with high-contrast typography and focus on architectural layout and quality photography.
results: Elevation of brand perception as a ritual experience
Integrated booking system with intuitive flow
Ritual gallery optimized for mobile devices
SEO strategy focused on local luxury keywords

onyx.title: Onyx
onyx.description: International legal boutique specialized in strategic architecture for highly complex matters and large wealth management.
onyx.challenge: To convey unwavering authority and absolute discretion through a digital interface that reflects the prestige of a global law firm.
onyx.solution: Minimalist and timeless design with classic typography, a monochromatic luxury palette, and a visual narrative focused on legacy and precision.
results: Visual identity that exudes sophistication and technical rigor
Information architecture focused on privacy and trust
Multilingual platform optimized for global luxury markets
Encrypted contact interface for maximum confidentiality

starkfit.title: StarkFit
starkfit.description: Digital ecosystem for an elite performance club, focused on transforming raw effort into legacy through advanced technology and luxury infrastructure.
starkfit.challenge: Designing an interface that conveys technical aggressiveness and unwavering exclusivity, balancing a brutalist aesthetic with the sophistication of a high-end brand.
starkfit.solution: Using Next.js and Framer Motion to create an immersive visual narrative, with high-impact typography, a high-contrast 'Dark Mode' palette, and information architecture focused on premium conversion.
results: Visual identity that breathes strength, precision, and elite culture
Fluid navigation experience with animations that reinforce the workout dynamics
Robust internationalization (i18n) system for scaling in global markets
Interface optimized for high-ticket membership plan conversion

lume.title: Lume
lume.description: Career engineering platform designed for elite professionals, eliminating friction between technical experience and approval in Applicant Tracking Systems (ATS).
lume.challenge: Develop a real-time editing interface that harmonizes structured data complexity with a fluid user experience, ensuring surgical precision in optimized document generation.
lume.solution: Architecture based on Next.js and Server Actions, integrating a live PDF rendering engine, rigorous validation with Zod/Prisma, and a minimalist UI powered by Framer Motion and View Transitions.
results: Zero Latency editing experience with high-fidelity instant preview
ATS Health Check validation system that boosts conversion rates in selection processes
Modular architecture allowing dynamic internationalization and multiple profile management
Premium interface with fluid micro-interactions and enterprise authentication via Clerk

thais.title: Thaís Crisley - Appear and Sell
thais.description: High-performance infrastructure for conversion landing pages, designed to eliminate latency between ad click and sales experience, using the state of the art of the React ecosystem.
thais.challenge: Develop a technical foundation that supports massive traffic with instant loading, while maintaining a premium, accessible interface (AA level) with multi-language support.
thais.solution: Modular engine based on Next.js 16 and Tailwind v4, prioritizing Server Components for extreme performance, typed i18n without URL prefixes, and an industrial scaffolding workflow via Plop.js.
results: 'Instant-Load' navigation experience with total focus on Core Web Vitals and server-side rendering
Minimalist and responsive interface with fluid micro-interactions via Framer Motion and Phosphor icons
Accelerated development workflow with automated component generation and i18n synchronization
Industrial-grade quality pipeline with regression testing (Vitest/Playwright) and continuous security auditing

magui.title: MAGUI.studio
magui.category: High-End Visual Strategy & Professional Interface Engineering
magui.description: Visual engineering and interfaces focused on performance and results for digital systems.
magui.challenge: Building an ultra-high-level universal template that unifies engineering rigor (Next.js 16/React 19) with the visual sophistication of authority design, ensuring 100/100 in all Core Web Vitals.
magui.solution: Architecture based on Next.js App Router, Tailwind CSS v4 and prefix-less i18n, incorporating an industrial workflow with Plop.js generators, unit/E2E testing and automated security and performance auditing.
results: Ultra-fast loading via Server Components and native asset optimization
Authority interface with Luxury typography and fluid micro-interactions via Framer Motion
Automated translation synchronization and strict typing for global scale
Robust CI/CD pipeline with mandatory build, lint and security validation

Metadata.title: Guibus | Fullstack Developer & Designer
Metadata.description: Portfolio of a Creative Technologist specializing in building high-performance digital products and scalable systems.
